SkillDetail.protectedDescription: The complete SKILL.md is delivered only through authenticated OceanSkill MCP calls. Public pages expose evaluation metadata, never protected instructions.
SkillDetail.stepOne: Sign in and create an API key
SkillDetail.stepTwo: Add OceanSkill MCP to your client
SkillDetail.stepThree: Invoke the protected skill when needed
SkillDetail.compatibilityDescription: This release has been reviewed for the clients listed below.
SkillDetail.faqOneQuestion: What does the public page reveal?
SkillDetail.faqOneAnswer: Only catalog metadata such as the title, description, compatibility, license, and current version.
SkillDetail.faqTwoQuestion: How is the full skill delivered?
SkillDetail.faqTwoAnswer: After authentication, your MCP client requests the protected content through the OceanSkill service boundary.
SkillDetail.faqThreeAnswer: Supabase Auth verifies identity while row-level security restricts keys, credits, orders, and usage events to their owner.
SkillDetail.noRelated: No other active skills are published in this category yet.
